verification.subject: Arteo Account Verification
verification.title: Welcome to Arteo
verification.message: Here is your OTP verification code to complete your registration:
verification.footer: This code is valid for 5 minutes. Please do not share this code with anyone.

recovery.subject: Arteo Password Recovery
recovery.title: Reset Your Password
recovery.message: We received a request to reset your Arteo account password. Click the button below to continue:
recovery.footer: If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
